calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants Woody Allen And Perdido Productions, Inc., To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS WOODY ALLEN AND PERDIDO PRODUCTIONS' Motion to Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Complaint is taken off calendar. The complaint was dismissed on March 16, 2015. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS WOODY ALLEN AND PERDIDO PRODUCTIONS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar. The complaint was dismissed on March 16, 2015. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. § 425.16
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS WOODY ALLEN AND PERDIDO PRODUCTIONS' Special Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Complaint Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. § 425.16 is taken off calendar. The complaint was dismissed on March 16, 2015. (See Law Offices of Andrew L. Ellis v. Yang (2009) 178 Cal.App.4th 869.) If Defendants want to pick up the DVDs that were lodged with the Court, please contact the clerk at (415) 551-3723 to make arrangements. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
